assertions.expectation: Identifies PDB as the most likely/common cause of stuck upgrades
assertions.reason: Document overview states 'Pod Disruption Budgets (PDBs)' are #1 reason (1st in likelihood order), and Step 1 title reinforces: 'Check Pod Disruption Budgets (Most Common Cause)'

assertions.expectation: Provides kubectl command to check PDBs (kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces or similar)
assertions.reason: Step 1 includes 'kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces -o wide' command with example output showing problematic ALLOWED DISRUPTIONS = 0 scenario

assertions.expectation: Provides commands to identify which pods are blocking the drain
assertions.reason: Step 1 includes commands to identify pods matching PDB labels and pods on nodes being upgraded using 'kubectl get pods' with label selectors

assertions.expectation: Includes resource constraint diagnosis (capacity issues, pending pods)
assertions.reason: Step 2 'Diagnose Resource Constraints' provides 'kubectl get pods -A --field-selector=status.phase=Pending' and FailedScheduling event checking

assertions.expectation: Provides a fix for restrictive PDBs (patch or temporary adjustment)
assertions.reason: 'Fix 1: Adjust Restrictive PDBs' includes kubectl patch commands for both maxUnavailable and minAvailable adjustment options

assertions.expectation: Includes guidance on surge upgrade settings as a potential fix
assertions.reason: 'Fix 2: Increase Node Surge' provides gcloud command to adjust max-surge-upgrade and max-unavailable-upgrade settings

assertions.expectation: Mentions webhook issues as a possible cause
assertions.reason: Step 4 'Check Admission Webhooks' is included as potential cause (listed as #4 in likelihood order), with kubectl commands to list and examine webhooks

assertions.expectation: Includes validation steps to confirm the fix is working
assertions.reason: 'Validation Steps to Confirm Fix is Working' section includes watch commands for node upgrade, pod eviction monitoring, terminating pod checks, and event log verification
